title: FindItems 1.1 [Update]
description:
Item Tracker HUD – a mod that lets you track selected items on a customizable HUD.
Add, edit, and remove items, switch between up to 9 pages (Alt + number), toggle the HUD, and it auto-shifts when chat is open.
body:
# Item Tracker HUD 1.1

**Item Tracker HUD** is a mod that lets you keep track of selected items directly on the HUD.  
Perfect for always having your resources in sight.  

---

## ✨ Features  
- 🌐 **Language support:** `de_de`, `en_us`, `es_es`, `fr_fr`, `it_it`, `ja_jp`, `pl_pl`, `ru_ru`  
- ➕ **Add** new items to your tracking list  
- ✏️ **Edit** and **remove** tracked items  
- 🔄 **Switch pages** (up to **9**) using `Alt + page number`  
- 📦 **5 items per page**  
- 👁️‍🗨️ **Toggle HUD** on/off anytime  
- 📜 **HUD auto-shifts** by ModMenu  
- 💾 **Separate lists saved** for singleplayer worlds and multiplayer servers
